query:
2. Eval harness is operational, and should have a current snapshot, but cannot guarantee the snapshot.  1. Lets to everything aligned with this spike.. we cannot create the strategy without some information.\
\
One more thing.. Our goal is very specifically to create a product that can evolve to support a corpus like the one we have.  Our goal is NOT to tailor our solution for our corpus and make our corpus perfect.  We'll use this corpus... actively been used for our purpose for some time... as the best evidence to inform our strategy.   Our hypothesis before, is that Informs (category relevance) could be a useful graph edge to establish a functional PPR to improve our result... but we've not been able to test that theory yet.

entries.title: ADR-006 nan-003: Seed Entry Categories Restricted + What/Why/Scope Quality Gate
ADR: Convention Follow/Deviate Detection via Metadata Matching (crt-008 ADR-005)
ADR-003 crt-029: Source-Candidate Bound Derived from max_graph_inference_per_tick, No Separate Config Field
Graph inference edge stall: supports_edge_threshold too conservative for retrospective-dominated corpus
Exposure bias in confidence-weighted retrieval: never-surfaced entries cannot bootstrap feedback signals
